topic: Apply and manage tags on resources and resource groups
key_facts: For example, this role can't apply tags to resources or resource groups through the Azure portal.
Each resource, resource group, and subscription can have a maximum of 50 tag name-value pairs.

Required access

 There are two ways to get the required access to tag resources:

 
 You can have write access to the Microsoft.Resources/tags resource type.
However, it can apply tags to subscriptions through the Azure portal.
It supports all tag operations through Azure PowerShell and REST API.
The Contributor role grants the required access to apply tags to any entity.
To apply tags to only one resource type, use the Contributor role for that resource.
